title: Structured Document Project (.sdoc-project)
description: Project manifest that defines a collection of .sdoc documents for unified export.

sdocProject.description: Schema version of this project manifest.

title.description: Project title used as the main document title in unified export.

documents.description: Ordered list of .sdoc documents in this project.

path.description: Relative path to the .sdoc file from this manifest.

label.description: Optional display label (defaults to filename if omitted).
